description: Developed by Satoshi Nakamoto in 2009, Bitcoin (BTC) is the world’s first and most recognized digital asset, known as digital gold. On AtlantisChain — the world’s only ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain — BTC reaches unprecedented speed and scalability. AtlantisChain’s BTC is a native ATC-20 token pegged 1:1 to Bitcoin, enabling instant transfers, 0.031-second block time, ultra-low gas fee of 0.0000002 ATC, and seamless liquidity across the Atlantis Kingdom ecosystem.
name: Bitcoin
